description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden structure resembling a rustic filing cabinet, constructed from horizontal planks with visible wood grain and knots. The sides and back are made of three thick wooden slats, while the front is partially open, revealing a dark, rounded object inside that appears to be a decorative or functional element. The corners are reinforced with vertical wooden posts, and the top is open, allowing easy access to the interior. The wood is finished in a warm, natural brown with darker streaks, giving it a handcrafted appearance. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, and the design is simple and robust. The overall look suggests it is more of a storage crate or box than a traditional filing cabinet.
description: A rustic, open-topped wooden box with thick planks and visible wood grain, resembling a storage crate. The front is open, revealing a dark, rounded object inside.
description_view_0: Side view showing three horizontal wooden planks and the open top, with the interior partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view with a wide opening, revealing the interior and the dark, rounded object inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with three horizontal planks and an open top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the interior more clearly, including the dark, rounded object and the wooden construction.
